department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSCE)

units.title: Data Structures and Algorithm Design
units.description: Fundamental data structures including lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, and hash tables. Algorithm analysis and design paradigms including divide-and-conquer, dynamic programming, and greedy algorithms.

units.title: Computer Architecture and Organization
units.description: Digital logic, processor design, memory hierarchy, instruction set architecture, pipelining, and performance evaluation of computer systems.

units.title: Operating Systems
units.description: Process management, memory management, file systems, synchronization primitives, scheduling algorithms, and system calls.

units.title: Software Engineering and Development
units.description: Software development lifecycle, requirements engineering, design patterns, testing methodologies, version control, and agile development practices.

units.title: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
units.description: Search algorithms, knowledge representation, machine learning fundamentals, neural networks, natural language processing, and generative AI systems.

units.title: Generative AI and Large Language Models
units.description: Transformer architectures, pre-training and fine-tuning, prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation, AI alignment, and responsible deployment of large language models.

units.title: Software Supply Chain Security
units.description: Dependency management, vulnerability scanning, software bill of materials (SBOM), provenance verification, CI/CD pipeline security, and policy-as-code enforcement.

units.title: Cryptography and Network Security
units.description: Symmetric and asymmetric cryptography, PKI, TLS/SSL, network protocols, intrusion detection, and security policy frameworks.

units.title: Cloud Native Systems and Infrastructure
units.description: Container orchestration with Kubernetes, microservices architecture, serverless computing, distributed tracing, service-level objectives, and cloud observability.

units.title: Computer Networks
units.description: Network protocols, TCP/IP stack, routing algorithms, congestion control, wireless networks, software-defined networking, and network programming.

units.title: Database Systems and Data Engineering
units.description: Relational and non-relational databases, SQL, query optimization, transaction management, distributed databases, and modern data pipeline architectures.

units.title: Programming Languages and Compilers
units.description: Language paradigms, type systems, lexical analysis, parsing, code generation, and runtime systems.
